title: Game Modes
description: Explore the different ways to play ZXSnake, from Solo mode to local and online multiplayer.

images.caption: Choose the game mode that matches the way you want to play.

sections.heading: Choose Your Game Mode
paragraphs: ZXSnake includes several ways to play, whether you're practising on your own, competing with friends, or taking on players from around the world.
Each game mode offers the same classic snake gameplay while providing a different style of challenge.

featureShowcases.heading: Play Your Way
featureShowcases.summary: Choose the game mode that best matches your style of play.
body: Whether you're chasing a new high score in Solo mode, competing locally with friends, or challenging players online, every mode offers a fresh way to enjoy ZXSnake.
Each game helps you improve your reactions, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete on the leaderboards.
bullets: Play Solo to improve your skills.
Unlock achievements and climb the leaderboards.

image.caption: Every game mode offers a different way to enjoy ZXSnake.

summary: Discover every way to play ZXSnake, from Solo mode to local and online multiplayer.
